text: Implement a lightweight, offline-first local storage solution using a compact JSON format. This allows the agent to store and retrieve critical data (like importance scores and recent memories) without relying on a remote server. This ensures faster response times and resilience in case of network outages, as data can be synced once connectivity is restored.
reason: This addresses the 'Remote Connectivity' learning point by providing a local, efficient storage mechanism. It reduces latency and improves performance, especially crucial for tasks requiring real-time updates and offline operation. The compact JSON format also simplifies data management and integration with existing tools.
